profile.pageDescription: View your account details and update your display name.

accountInfo.title: Account Info
accountInfo.description: Your email address cannot be changed.

form.nicknameHint: When set, this is shown instead of your name throughout the dashboard.
form.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer
form.nicknameTooLong: Nickname must be 50 characters or fewer

password.pageDescription: Verify your current password, then set a new one.
password.cardDescription: After changing your password, sessions on other devices will be signed out automatically.

form.newPasswordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
form.newPasswordTooLong: Password must be 128 characters or fewer
form.changeSuccess: Password changed. Sessions on other devices have been signed out.

organizations.pageDescription: View your organizations and roles, and switch your active organization.
organizations.listDescriptionWithCount: You belong to {count} {count, plural, one {organization} other {organizations}}.
organizations.listDescriptionEmpty: You are not a member of any organization yet.
organizations.emptyState: You are not a member of any organization yet.
